description_long: This is a standard orange traffic cone with a wide, square base and a tall, tapering conical body. The cone features a single broad white reflective stripe around its midsection, enhancing its visibility in low-light conditions. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, typical of durable plastic or rubber materials used for outdoor safety equipment. The base is flat and robust, designed to provide stability and prevent tipping, while the tip is solid and rounded for safety. There are no visible logos, text, or additional markings on the exterior. The overall condition of the cone appears new, with no signs of wear, dirt, or damage.
description: A bright orange traffic cone with a wide square base and a single white reflective stripe, appearing new and clean.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the orange cone, the wide square base, and the central white reflective stripe.
description_view_1: Side view similar to the front, highlighting the smooth taper of the cone and the even width of the reflective stripe.
description_view_2: Another angled view, showing the consistent shape and color, with the base and stripe clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the cone's symmetry and the uninterrupted reflective stripe.
attribute_reflective_stripes: One wide white reflective stripe encircles the cone at mid-height.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is solid, rounded, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is a wide, flat square, slightly thicker than the cone body, likely made of heavier rubber for stability, with no visible patterns.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: The object appears new, clean, and undamaged.
